description: Complete multi-language support across admin panel views. Currently only TheSidebar and DashboardView use i18n keys - all other views (SettingsView, NodesView, TicketsView, etc.) have hardcoded English strings. Add missing translation keys for all user-facing strings in the modified views and ensure the panel is fully translatable in EN, FA, and ZH.
steps: In panel/panel/web/admin/src/i18n.ts: Add comprehensive translation keys for all views. Add keys for: settings page (tab labels, section titles, form labels, buttons), nodes page (tab labels, form labels, protocol names, status labels), tickets page (headers, actions), topbar (search placeholder), sidebar (new tickets nav label), backup section, and VPN cores protocol option labels.

Add to EN translations: 'nav.tickets': 'Tickets', 'settings.panel_settings': 'Panel Settings', 'settings.data_warnings': 'Data Warnings', 'settings.telegram': 'Telegram Bot', 'settings.certificates': 'Certificates', 'settings.backup': 'Backup', 'settings.save': 'Save Settings', 'settings.export': 'Export Backup', 'settings.import': 'Import Backup', 'settings.panel_name': 'Panel Name', 'settings.language': 'Language', 'nodes.add_node': 'Add Node', 'nodes.cores': 'Cores', 'nodes.protocol_options': 'Protocol Options', 'nodes.advanced': 'Advanced Settings', 'label.enabled': 'Enabled', 'label.disabled': 'Disabled', and similar for all hardcoded strings in modified views.

Add corresponding FA translations: 'nav.tickets': 'تیکت‌ها', 'settings.panel_settings': 'تنظیمات پنل', 'settings.data_warnings': 'هشدار مصرف', 'settings.telegram': 'ربات تلگرام', 'settings.certificates': 'گواهی‌نامه‌ها', 'settings.backup': 'پشتیبان‌گیری', 'settings.save': 'ذخیره تنظیمات', 'settings.export': 'دریافت پشتیبان', 'settings.import': 'بازگردانی پشتیبان', etc.

Add corresponding ZH translations: 'nav.tickets': '工单', 'settings.panel_settings': '面板设置', 'settings.data_warnings': '流量警告', 'settings.telegram': 'Telegram机器人', 'settings.certificates': '证书', 'settings.backup': '备份', 'settings.save': '保存设置', 'settings.export': '导出备份', 'settings.import': '导入备份', etc.
Update SettingsView.vue to use t() for tab labels, section titles, form labels, and buttons.
Update TheSidebar.vue: use a proper translation key for the new tickets nav item.
Update TheTopbar.vue: use t('label.search') for the search placeholder text.
Ensure the admin main.ts or App.vue imports '@/i18n' early so messages are registered before any component renders.
acceptance_criteria: All user-facing strings in modified views (Settings, Topbar, Sidebar) use t() translation function
Switching language to FA shows all strings in Persian with RTL direction
Switching language to ZH shows all strings in Chinese
No raw English strings remain in the template sections of modified components (except technical terms like 'OpenVPN', 'IKEv2', etc.)
